name: Dragonic Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜の騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴン・ナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When the effect of an opponent's monster is activated that targets and destroys a card(s) you control, you can send the targeted card(s) to the Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.
mnst_eff: When the effect of an opponent's monster is activated that targets and destroys a card(s) you control, you can send the targeted card(s) to the Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.
eff: When the effect of an opponent's monster is activated that targets and destroys a card(s) you control, you can send the targeted card(s) to the Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
